svg.text: webui/ git push triggers build + deploy
api.traillenshq.com | Stage throttle: 5,000 RPS / 2,500 burst | Auth: 1,000 RPS
Created by infra/ | Routes attached by api-dynamo/ via Pulumi StackReference
auth.traillenshq.com | Deletion Protection: ACTIVE | JWT tokens
8 Groups: traillenshq-admin, admin, org-admin, trail-owner, trail-crew, trail-status, content-moderator, org-member
JWT claims: sub, email, cognito:groups, custom:organization_id
Email via SES (no 50/day limit) | MFA enforcement for admin roles (7-day grace)
Determines challenge: magic link vs passkey
Generates magic link token → DynamoDB + SES
Validates token, marks used in DynamoDB
GSI1–GSI5: overloaded indexes, projection ALL | GSI6: geohash geospatial (map bounds queries)
66 access patterns | PAY_PER_REQUEST | TTL on tokens + temp data | PITR: 35 days
Deletion Protection enabled | SSE: AWS managed keys (AES-256)
Key patterns: TRAILSYSTEM#{id}, USER#{sub}, MAGICLINK#{token}, CAREREPORT#{id}, ORG#{id}
JWT signing keys | Internal API tokens
TrailLensHQ System Architecture v3.0 | April 2026 | ca-central-1 | 10 Lambda functions | Single-table DynamoDB (66 access patterns, 6 GSIs) | 100K DAU design target
